headline: Discover which S&P500 stocks are making waves on Thursday.

headline: VeriSign shares are trading higher after Citigroup maintained its Buy rating on the stock and raised its price target from $280 to $295.

headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on VeriSign, Raises Price Target to $295
summary: Citigroup  analyst Jamesmichael Sherman-Lewis   maintains VeriSign (NASDAQ:VRSN) with a Buy and raises the price target from $280 to $295.
